job_statement: When I need to implement continuous deployment for cloud-native applications, I want to use a declarative approach that manages infrastructure and application configurations through Git, so I can create repeatable processes across multi-cluster Kubernetes environments and automate complex deployments
related_jobs: Manage application lifecycle across multiple environments; Automate cluster configuration
desired_outcomes: Minimize time required to deploy applications across multiple clusters; Reduce infrastructure configuration sprawl; Ensure configuration changes are auditable and versioned; Minimize deployment and release cycle time

job_statement: When deploying applications to multiple clusters in different environments, I want to ensure consistency using a GitOps tool that maintains cluster resources through continuous monitoring and reconciliation, so I can keep configurations in sync with their desired state
related_jobs: Configure CI/CD pipelines; Manage multi-environment deployments
desired_outcomes: Ensure clusters maintain consistent state across environments; Minimize time to detect configuration drift; Reduce manual intervention required for configuration sync; Ensure configuration changes can be automatically or manually resynced

job_statement: When managing multiple OpenShift clusters, I want to automate configuration management tasks including state synchronization, change application/reversion, and application promotion, so I can efficiently manage cluster configurations and application deployments at scale
parent_job: Ensure application consistency across multiple clusters
prerequisites: Deploy Red Hat OpenShift GitOps; Configure Git repositories with desired state
related_jobs: Promote applications across environments; Manage cluster configuration drift
desired_outcomes: Ensure all clusters have similar states for configuration, monitoring, and storage; Minimize time to apply or revert configuration changes across multiple clusters; Reduce errors when promoting applications from staging to production; Ensure templated configurations are correctly associated with environments
